title: 3 Dividend Aristocrats With Yields Over 4%
text: When searching for great dividend stocks to buy, there are many places one could start. However, we prefer the strategy of buying those that have demonstrated histories of raising their dividends.

title: 4 Investment Management Stocks to Look at Despite Industry Woes
text: While elevated technology costs remain worrisome, continued inflows will likely aid Zacks Investment Management stocks like BlackRock (BLK), Blue Owl (OWL), Franklin (BEN) and Affiliated Managers (AMG).

title: Clarion Partners Real Estate Income Fund Inc. (CPREIF) Acquires Three-Building Industrial Portfolio in the Inland Empire West Area
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Clarion Partners Real Estate Income Fund added three warehouse and distribution buildings in Chino, CA. The deal was marketed by JLL Capital Markets.

title: Sam Fraenkel Joins Fiduciary Trust International as Coral Gables-Based Wealth Director

title: Buy 6 August 40+ Year Dividend Growers
text: DRIP Investing lists over 800 stocks that have annually increased dividends for 5 years or more. As of July, 62 stocks have hiked their dividends annually 40 years or more. Parsed from 129 Champions, utilizing YCharts data as of 8/15/22, those 62 select-dividend stocks ranged 0.87% to 5.95% in annual yield, and ranged -17.74% to 31.143% in analyst 1-yr price.

title: Clarion Partners Real Estate Income Fund Inc. (CPREIF) Acquires Two-Building Industrial Distribution Center in El Paso, Texas
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Clarion Partners Real Estate Income Fund has acquired the 369,310 square foot Rojas East Distribution Center in El Paso, Texas.

title: Franklin's (BEN) July AUM Rises 3.6% on Favorable Markets
text: Franklin's (BEN) July AUM balance improves on the back of robust market performance.

title: Prem Watsa Bulks Up Atlas Stake Following Buyout Offer
text: Billionaire investor Prem Watsa (Trades, Portfolio), the leader of Fairfax Financial Holdings ( TSX:FFH , Financial), revealed he increased his firm's exposure to top holding Atlas Corp. ( ATCO , Financial) by 4.81% earlier this week.

title: Buy 4 S&P 500 August Dog Days Dividend Aristocrats
text: "Dividend Aristocrats in the S&P 500 Index have raised their annual payouts every year for at least 25 consecutive years." - Kiplinger.com/Investing. 65 Aristocrats screened as of August 4, 2022 represented all eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker estimated top-ten net gains ranged 14.54%-40.69% topped by XOM & SWK.

title: Templeton Dragon Fund, Inc. (“TDF”) Announces Distribution
text: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Templeton Dragon Fund, Inc. (NYSE: TDF) today announced a total distribution of $1.3014 per share, comprised of short-term capital gains of $0.0033 per share and long-term capital gains of $1.2981 per share, payable on August 31, 2022, to shareholders of record on August 15, 2022 (Ex-Dividend Date: August 12, 2022). title: Franklin Resources Is Still A Hold As It Struggles To Grow
text: Franklin Resources is a dividend aristocrat with a long history of dividend growth. The current valuation of Franklin Resources is extremely attractive.
